popularStory.headline: The Battle of Shrewsbury
popularStory.description:
Quick Summery-

The battle fought on 21 July 1403, waged between an army led by the Lancastrian King Henry IV and a rebel army led by Henry "Harry Hotspur" Percy from Northumberland.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Blount於1350年出生在英國德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓時，他的父親Sir John Blount I52歲，母親Iseult Mountjoy43歲。他與Sancha de Ayala結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1403年7月21日在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Blount于1350年出生在英国德比夏爾艾爾瓦斯頓时，他的父亲Sir John Blount I52岁，母亲Iseult Mountjoy43岁。他与Sancha de Ayala结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1403年7月21日在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Blount was born in 1350, in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir John Blount I, was 52 and his mother, Iseult Mountjoy, was 43. He married Sancha de Ayala. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 21 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Blount est né en 1350, à Elvaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Blount I, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Iseult Mountjoy, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Sancha de Ayala. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 21 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Blount 1350 in Elvaston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Blount I 52 und seine Mutter Iseult Mountjoy 43. Er hat Sancha de Ayala geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Juli 1403 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Blount è nato il nel 1350 nel Elvaston, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Blount I, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Iseult Mountjoy, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Sancha de Ayala. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Blountが1350年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアエルヴァストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Blount Iは52歳，母Iseult Mountjoyは43歳であった。Sancha de Ayalaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年7月21日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Blount(이)가 1350년 영국 더비실르 엘바스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Blount I(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Iseult Mountjoy(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Sancha de Ayala(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1403년 7월 21일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

mn.St. Mary's of Newark, Leicester, Leices: Leicester, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Blount nasceu em 1350, em Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Blount I, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Iseult Mountjoy, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Sancha de Ayala. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Blount родился в 1350 г. в местности элвастон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Blount I было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Iseult Mountjoy, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Sancha de Ayala. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 21 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Blount nació en 1350, en Elvaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Blount I, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Iseult Mountjoy, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Sancha de Ayala. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
